name: grok-subagent
description: Run authenticated Grok Build agents as controlled external subagents from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate bounded work to Grok Build agents.
interface.longDescription: Let Codex start, steer, inspect, cancel, and close authenticated Grok Build ACP sessions with enforced read-only or isolated-worktree sandboxes.
defaultPrompt: Ask Grok to investigate this project independently.
Have Grok review my current implementation plan.
Run a Grok worker in an isolated worktree.
